company.name: YuJa EqualGround
company.elevator_pitch: EqualGround is an enterprise-grade digital accessibility platform that automates the discovery and remediation of accessibility issues to ensure ADA and WCAG compliance — protecting institutions from DOJ lawsuits.

unique_selling_points.source_code_remediation: We don't just flag problems — we fix them at the source code level. Most tools scan and report. EqualGround scans and fixes.
unique_selling_points.deep_pdf_remediation: Industry-leading Deep PDF Remediation with Structural Remediation Max. Bulk scanning scores your entire document library automatically. Autopilot fixes straightforward documents without manual intervention. Structural Remediation Max handles complex documents — tables, reading order, redacted content, commissioner agendas — with a visual drag-and-drop editor. 80-90% of document backlogs clear automatically without manual intervention.
unique_selling_points.autopilot: Our Autopilot feature automatically remediates accessibility errors without manual intervention. Unlike competitors where you have to fix every issue by hand, Autopilot does the heavy lifting.
unique_selling_points.full_digital_footprint: Scans CMS, websites, documents, PDFs, and applications — not just web pages.

title_ii_compliance.regulation: DOJ updated ADA Title II requiring all state/local government and public education websites and apps to meet WCAG 2.1 Level AA.
consequences: Public complaints filed with Office of Civil Rights
title_ii_compliance.urgency_note: The DOJ issued an Interim Final Rule on April 20, 2026 extending both deadlines by one year. Large entities now have until April 26, 2027. Small entities until April 26, 2028. The extension was granted because the DOJ admitted it overestimated technology readiness — meaning the compliance work is real and harder than expected, not easier. Substantive requirements are unchanged. Private right of action still exists.

pricing.model: Based on total scope — web pages and documents (PDFs) across their digital footprint.
pricing.talk_track: Our pricing maps directly to your actual scope — total page count and document volume. We do a quick scan of your footprint and tier it so you only pay for what you need.
pricing.if_pushed: Offer to do a quick scan of their footprint to scope it and provide a tailored quote. Do NOT quote numbers on the phone.
pricing.anchor: Position against cost of a DOJ lawsuit. A single complaint costs more to defend than a year of EqualGround.

demo_offer.what_happens: Share screen, walk through how EqualGround is helping similar institutions, show their specific scan results, learn about their setup.
demo_offer.positioning: Low-pressure. Not a sales pitch — a knowledge-sharing conversation. Frame as 'seeing if it makes sense' not 'buying something'.
